description: Universal PR review acceptance checklist contract

core.title: Diff is scoped and coherent
core.description: Change set stays within expected scope and file-count guardrails.

core.title: Required CI signals are green
core.description: No required CI check is currently failing for this head SHA.

core.title: Evidence package exists
core.description: Evidence manifest and artifacts are present and readable.

core.title: At least 2 screenshots captured
core.description: PR evidence contains at least the configured screenshot minimum.

core.title: At least 1 video captured
core.description: PR evidence contains at least the configured video minimum.

core.title: No harness policy violations
core.description: Risk/policy gate decision is in an allowed pass state.

core.title: Agent blocking evals pass
core.description: Deterministic blocking agent eval suite completed and passed for required risk tiers.

core.title: Infrastructure preflight passes
core.description: Workflow preflight checks for secrets, connectivity, tooling, and GitHub API access are healthy.

core.title: Workflow resume integrity passes
core.description: Durable workflow engine preserves cursor state and resumes without replaying completed steps.

core.title: Namespace isolation passes
core.description: Core persistence paths enforce namespace boundaries and prevent cross-namespace leaks.

core.title: Approval matrix is enforced
core.description: High-risk action classes are blocked unless approval requirements are satisfied.

core.title: SQLite concurrency guardrails pass
core.description: Busy lock handling and concurrency behavior remain within the expected reliability envelope.
